prompt: For a protein engineering research program, develop variants of Enoyl-[acyl-carrier-protein] reductase (InhA) (bacterial fatty acid synthesis enzyme (isoniazid target)) from Mycobacterium tuberculosis with altered substrate specificity or improved catalytic efficiency. outline a computational methodology covering: (1) active site scaffold selection, (2) catalytic residue placement using ESMFold, (3) substrate binding optimization and variant screening. Describe the key steps and decision points in the workflow.
